description: cmd_1636 Phase B 試運転 (ash2): 2fDGaHU2VZs 1本処理 (3並列安全確認)
steps: 0) advisor()呼出 1) 【3並列安全確認フェーズ】ash1+ash3と同時並列 — 事前メモリ確認: free -h && nvidia-smi 2) VIDEO_ID=2fDGaHU2VZs && mkdir -p /home/murakami/multi-agent-shogun/projects/dozle_kirinuki/work/cmd_1636_2fDGaHU2VZs/{input,output} 3) cd /home/murakami/multi-agent-shogun/projects/dozle_kirinuki && source ~/.bashrc && source venv/bin/activate && python3 scripts/downloader.py 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2fDGaHU2VZs' --output-dir work/cmd_1636_2fDGaHU2VZs/input/ 4) python3 scripts/vocal_stt_pipeline.py work/cmd_1636_2fDGaHU2VZs/input/2fDGaHU2VZs.mp4 --output /home/murakami/multi-agent-shogun/projects/dozle_kirinuki/work/srt_and_candidates/merged_2fDGaHU2VZs.json --work-dir work/cmd_1636_2fDGaHU2VZs/output/ --cache 5) 完了後: free -h && nvidia-smi で最終メモリ記録 6) A-F検証 & dmesg OOM確認 7) advisor()呼出 8) inbox karo 完了報告
notes: Phase A完了確認後のみ実行。GEMINI API期限切れのためscene_search_v2 build禁止。
